overview: International Institute of Information Technology Bangalore (IIIT Bangalore), located in Electronic City Phase 1, Bengaluru, Karnataka, is a premier autonomous public-private partnership (PPP) university established in 1999. Jointly promoted by the Government of Karnataka and the IT industry, the institute is renowned for its research-driven ecosystem, advanced technology programs, industry collaboration, and strong placement outcomes.

placements.companiesVisited: Google, Microsoft, Apple, Amazon, Adobe, Goldman Sachs, Nvidia, Flipkart
placements.internationalOffers: High-value global and quant-tech offers from multinational firms

admissions.admissionProcess: UG admissions are based on JEE Main ranks through direct institute applications (not through JoSAA). PG admissions are based on GATE scores followed by institute-level selection processes.
admissions.importantDates: Admission timelines follow IIIT Bangalore admission notifications and academic calendar.

campus.area: Urban technology campus located in Electronic City Phase 1, Bengaluru
campus.specialNote: Residential stay is mandatory. Hostel charges are ₹78,000 annually plus a refundable hostel caution deposit of ₹15,000. Mess charges are ₹57,600 annually.

scholarships.name: Utkarsha Scholarship
scholarships.benefit: 100% tuition fee waiver for top JEE Main rankers

scholarships.name: Industry Sponsored Fellowships
scholarships.benefit: Research and thesis stipends sponsored by companies like Siemens and Intel

scholarships.name: GATE Fellowship
scholarships.benefit: ₹12,400 per month stipend for eligible M.Tech students

contact.address: International Institute of Information Technology Bangalore, Electronic City Phase 1, Bengaluru – 560100, Karnataka, India
